unit.name: WP_Http request unsafe URL validation decision
unit.area: src/wp-includes/class-wp-http.php with WP_HTTP_Proxy, WP_HTTP_Requests_Hooks, WP_HTTP_Requests_Response, WP_HTTP_Response, and WP_Http_Cookie support
unit.public_contract: This candidate promotes only the WP_Http::request decision that reject_unsafe_urls runs wp_http_validate_url() while the wp_kses_bad_protocol boundary exists. PHP still owns public request ABI, http_request_reject_unsafe_urls filtering, function_exists behavior, wp_http_validate_url semantics, URL mutation shape, bad-protocol stripping, invalid-url WP_Error construction/debug timing, hook object mechanics, proxy option/auth handoff, pre_http_send_through_proxy overrides, Requests dispatch, response filtering, and native arrays/objects.

bridge.removal_gate: Replace copied public PHP with generated original-path adapters and pass request proxy/safety, selected upstream HTTP PHPUnit, installed distribution, and live/recorded network/proxy parity gates before claiming public PHP ownership.
